'''鈭歾-r-ng''' ('''kazarang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voluntell|voluntell]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voluntell|voluntell]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-r-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kazarang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizarang|thizarang]] || [[word:jizarang|jizarang]] || [[word:shizarang|shizarang]] || [[word:kizarang|kizarang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzarang|thuthuzarang]] || [[word:jujuzarang|jujuzarang]] || [[word:shushuzarang|shushuzarang]] || [[word:kukuzarang|kukuzarang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzarang|thuzarang]] || [[word:juzarang|juzarang]] || [[word:shuzarang|shuzarang]] || [[word:kuzarang|kuzarang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzarang|thuzarang]] || [[word:juzarang|juzarang]] || [[word:shuzarang|shuzarang]] || [[word:kuzarang|kuzarang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezarang|thezarang]] || [[word:jezarang|jezarang]] || [[word:shezarang|shezarang]] || [[word:kezarang|kezarang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozarang|thothozarang]] || [[word:jojozarang|jojozarang]] || [[word:shoshozarang|shoshozarang]] || [[word:kokozarang|kokozarang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozarang|thozarang]] || [[word:jozarang|jozarang]] || [[word:shozarang|shozarang]] || [[word:kozarang|kozarang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozarang|thozarang]] || [[word:jozarang|jozarang]] || [[word:shozarang|shozarang]] || [[word:kozarang|kozarang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]] || [[word:zarang|zarang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zarang|th忙zarang]] || [[word:j忙zarang|j忙zarang]] || [[word:sh忙zarang|sh忙zarang]] || [[word:k忙zarang|k忙zarang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazarang|thathazarang]] || [[word:jajazarang|jajazarang]] || [[word:shashazarang|shashazarang]] || [[word:kakazarang|kakazarang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazarang|thazarang]] || [[word:jazarang|jazarang]] || [[word:shazarang|shazarang]] || [[word:kazarang|kazarang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazarang|thazarang]] || [[word:jazarang|jazarang]] || [[word:shazarang|shazarang]] || [[word:kazarang|kazarang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazarang|shazarang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazarang|goshazarang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazarang|gokishazarang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazarangn眉|shazarangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazarangnkn眉|goshazarangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazarangn眉|gokishazarangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazarangsh毛|shazarangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazarangnksh毛|goshazarangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazarangsh毛|gokishazarangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazarangro|shazarangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazarangnkro|goshazarangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazarangro|gokishazarangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazarangmu|shazarangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazarangnkmu|goshazarangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazarangmu|gokishazarangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazarangsher|shazarangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazarangnksher|goshazarangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazarangsher|gokishazarangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazarangng|shazarangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazarangnkng|goshazarangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazarangng|gokishazarangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazarangya|shazarangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazarangnkya|goshazarangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazarangya|gokishazarangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazarangyam|shazarangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazarangnkyam|goshazarangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazarangyam|gokishazarangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazarangn眉sh毛|shazarangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazarangnkn眉sh毛|goshazarangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazarangn眉sh毛|gokishazarangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazarangn眉ro|shazarangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazarangnkn眉ro|goshazarangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazarangn眉ro|gokishazarangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazarangn眉mu|shazarangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazarangnkn眉mu|goshazarangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazarangn眉mu|gokishazarangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazarangsh毛n眉|shazarangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazarangnksh毛n眉|goshazarangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazarangsh毛n眉|gokishazarangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazarangsh毛ro|shazarangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazarangnksh毛ro|goshazarangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazarangsh毛ro|gokishazarangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazarangsh毛mu|shazarangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazarangnksh毛mu|goshazarangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazarangsh毛mu|gokishazarangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazarangron眉|shazarangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazarangnkron眉|goshazarangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazarangron眉|gokishazarangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazarangrosh毛|shazarangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazarangnkrosh毛|goshazarangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazarangrosh毛|gokishazarangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazarangromu|shazarangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazarangnkromu|goshazarangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazarangromu|gokishazarangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazarangmun眉|shazarangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazarangnkmun眉|goshazarangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazarangmun眉|gokishazarangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazarangmush毛|shazarangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazarangnkmush毛|goshazarangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazarangmush毛|gokishazarangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazarangmuro|shazarangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazarangnkmuro|goshazarangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazarangmuro|gokishazarangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
